mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_compare (order_id, goods_id, count) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.goodsId}, #{item.count})
mapper.select: SELECT order_Id,goods_id,count FROM order_compare WHERE order_id = #{orderId};
SELECT order_Id,goods_id,count FROM order_compare WHERE order_id = #{orderId} limit #{currentPage} offset #{offset};
